meaning: n.(解决问题的)线索,线团vt.绕成线球,提示
examples: That is to say, he found a clew.
Clew: Do you have a dream of your life?
The captain asked the sailors to clew ( the sails ) up.
The views over picturesque Clew Bay, which is dotted with 365 islands, are dazzling, especially at sunset.
The nearby accommodation at the Carlton Atlantic Coast Hotel has beautiful views across the birders paradise of Clew Bay.
